zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Lady of Bury Hatley Bedfordshire, Kilpeck於1490年出生在英國貝德福爾。她於1504年與Sir Ralph Gibbons在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1574年12月11日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東享年84歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Bury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: of various origins. In the case of the film actor  Burt Lancaster  (  1913–1994 ) it is a short form of   Burton  , but it has also been used as a variant spelling of   Bert .  The pianist and composer  Burt Bacharach  (  b. 1928 ) was the son of a  Bert Bacharach , and his given name is presumably simply a variation of his father's.

nameMeanings.name: Hatley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which derives from a place name, probably Hailey in Oxfordshire, which was originally named from Old English hēg ‘hay’ + lēah ‘clearing’. Use as a given name began in the 1960s, inspired perhaps by the actress Hayley Mills ( b. 1946 ), daughter of Sir John Mills and Mary Hayley Bell , and enjoyed great popularity until the late 1990s.

variants.name: Haylee
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which derives from a place name, probably Hailey in Oxfordshire, which was originally named from Old English hēg ‘hay’ + lēah ‘clearing’. historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Lady of Bury Hatley Bedfordshire, Kilpeck was born in 1490, in Bedfordshire, England. She married Sir Ralph Gibbons in 1504, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 11 December 1574, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 84, and was buried in England.

Elle est décédée le 11 décembre 1574, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Lady of Bury Hatley Bedfordshire, Kilpeckは1490年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた。1504年にイギリスでSir Ralph Gibbonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1574年12月11日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアワットオン アト ストーンで84歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Watton, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Lady of Bury Hatley Bedfordshire, Kilpeck(은)는 1490년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1504년 영국에서 Sir Ralph Gibbons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1574년 12월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

ru.Watton, Hertfordshire, England: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Lady of Bury Hatley Bedfordshire, Kilpeck родилась в 1490 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Gibbons в 1504 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 11 декабря 1574 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 84 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.
